articles.title: Iran announces alternative routes in Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Tehran has agreed to temporarily reopen the Strait of Hormuz as part of a two-week truce. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:

– Iran announced alternative routes on April 9 for ships travelling through the Strait of Hormuz, citing the risk of sea mines in the main zone of the vital waterway.
